data_chart.when: an animated chart of real numbers from the script, in the dark register

notes: The gold-standard identity leans on its signature archetypes (strike_swap, receipt_print, device_showcase + card_handoff, counter_scale, cursor_press) rather than external blocks. FWED appears at most once per render via data.mascot; the needle mark lives in the brand chrome and morph_cta.
